coach.hint: Chunk it: I knew I had to go to the hospital.

items.line_en: My friend Sarah drove me to the hospital.

coach.say: My friend Sarah drove me to the hospital.
coach.hint: Chunk it: My friend Sarah drove me to the hospital.

items.line_en: When we arrived, I went to the reception desk.

coach.say: When we arrived, I went to the reception desk.
coach.hint: Chunk it: When we arrived, / I went to the reception desk.

items.line_en: The receptionist asked for my name and some details.

coach.say: The receptionist asked for my name and some details.
coach.hint: Chunk it: The receptionist asked for my name and / some details.

items.line_en: Then he gave me a form to fill out.

coach.say: Then he gave me a form to fill out.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Then he gave me a form to fill out.

items.line_en: I wrote my name, age and symptoms on the form.

coach.say: I wrote my name, age and symptoms on the form.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I wrote my name, / age and symptoms on the form.

items.line_en: After a short wait, a nurse called my name.

coach.say: After a short wait, a nurse called my name.
coach.hint: Chunk it: After a short wait, / a nurse called my name.

items.line_en: She took me to a small room and checked my temperature and blood pressure.

coach.say: She took me to a small room and checked my temperature and blood pressure.
coach.hint: Chunk it: She took me to a small room and checked my temperature and / blood pressure.

items.line_en: The nurse was very kind and asked me about my symptoms.

coach.say: The nurse was very kind and asked me about my symptoms.
coach.hint: Chunk it: The nurse was very kind and / asked me about my symptoms.

items.line_en: I told her about my stomach pain, diarrhea and vomiting.

coach.say: I told her about my stomach pain, diarrhea and vomiting.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I told her about my stomach pain, / diarrhea and vomiting.

items.line_en: She nodded and wrote everything down.

coach.say: She nodded and wrote everything down.
coach.hint: Chunk it: She nodded and / wrote everything down.

items.line_en: Soon, a doctor came in.

coach.say: Soon, a doctor came in.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Soon, / a doctor came in.

items.line_en: I explained my symptoms to him.

coach.say: I explained my symptoms to him.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I explained my symptoms to him.

items.line_en: Dr. Smith listened carefully and asked a few more questions.

coach.say: Dr. Smith listened carefully and asked a few more questions.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Dr. / Smith listened carefully and asked a few more questions.

items.line_en: He then examined my stomach and asked about what I had eaten recently.

coach.say: He then examined my stomach and asked about what I had eaten recently.
coach.hint: Chunk it: He then examined my stomach and / asked about what I had eaten recently.

items.line_en: It sounds like you have food poisoning.

coach.say: It sounds like you have food poisoning.
coach.hint: Chunk it: It sounds like you have food poisoning.

items.line_en: Dr. Smith said,

coach.say: Dr. Smith said,
coach.hint: Chunk it: Dr. / Smith said,

items.line_en: We need to give you some medicine and fluids to help you feel better.

coach.say: We need to give you some medicine and fluids to help you feel better.
coach.hint: Chunk it: We need to give you some medicine and / fluids to help you feel better.

items.line_en: He explained that I would receive an IV drip to keep me hydrated.

coach.say: He explained that I would receive an IV drip to keep me hydrated.
coach.hint: Chunk it: He explained that I would receive an IV drip to keep me hydrated.

items.line_en: The nurse returned and gently inserted the IV needle into my arm.

coach.say: The nurse returned and gently inserted the IV needle into my arm.
coach.hint: Chunk it: The nurse returned and / gently inserted the IV needle into my arm.

items.line_en: I lay down and tried to relax.

coach.say: I lay down and tried to relax.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I lay down and / tried to relax.

items.line_en: After a while, I started to feel a bit better.

coach.say: After a while, I started to feel a bit better.
coach.hint: Chunk it: After a while, / I started to feel a bit better.

items.line_en: Dr. Smith came back to check on me.

coach.say: Dr. Smith came back to check on me.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Dr. / Smith came back to check on me.

items.line_en: You were doing well, Julia, he said.

coach.say: You were doing well, Julia, he said.
coach.hint: Chunk it: You were doing well, / Julia, / he said.

items.line_en: You should rest and drink plenty of water.

coach.say: You should rest and drink plenty of water.
coach.hint: Chunk it: You should rest and / drink plenty of water.

items.line_en: Avoid eating any solid food for now.

coach.say: Avoid eating any solid food for now.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Avoid eating any solid food for now.

items.line_en: Before I left, the nurse gave me some medicine and instructions on how to take it.

coach.say: Before I left, the nurse gave me some medicine and instructions on how to take it.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Before I left, / the nurse gave me some medicine and instructions on how to take it.

items.line_en: She also reminded me to come back if I didn't feel better soon.

coach.say: She also reminded me to come back if I didn't feel better soon.
coach.hint: Chunk it: She also reminded me to come back if / I didn't feel better soon.

items.line_en: I thanked the doctor and nurse and left the hospital with Sarah.

coach.say: I thanked the doctor and nurse and left the hospital with Sarah.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I thanked the doctor and nurse and / left the hospital with Sarah.

items.line_en: Great job today. Keep up the amazing effort.

coach.say: Great job today. Keep up the amazing effort.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Great job today. / Keep up the amazing effort.

items.line_en: Remember every lesson takes you a step closer to fluency in English.

coach.say: Remember every lesson takes you a step closer to fluency in English.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Remember every lesson takes you a step closer to fluency in English.

items.line_en: Don't forget to like, share and subscribe for more fun and helpful English lessons.

coach.say: Don't forget to like, share and subscribe for more fun and helpful English lessons.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Don't forget to like, / share and subscribe for more fun and helpful English lessons.

items.line_en: See you soon. Goodbye and happy learning.

coach.say: See you soon. Goodbye and happy learning.
coach.hint: Chunk it: See you soon. / Goodbye and happy learning.
